You can share the German tech tree DD captain if you don’t want to create a dedicated captain
Lütjens is recommended due to his improved GtG and PM. See here for a ship priority list for this captain.
Close range gunboat with US long duration smoke and unusually long range torps
Her gun ballistics are very similar to US DDs, so get close as possible before shooting
If you prefer RPF, trade Fill the Tubes and Swift Fish
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Italian DD that trades torp range for French speed boost and usable base gun range
Her gun ballistics are very similar to US DDs, so get close as possible before shooting
If you prefer RPF, trade BFT and Consumables Specialist
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Pan-Asia DD with a Soviet gunboat DD handling and playstyle
Essentially a Tier 6 Gnevny with 8km torps
Anshan is a Gnevny class DD that was purchased from the Soviet Union in 1953 and served in the People’s Liberation Army Navy until 1992.
Today you can visit her in Qingdao where she resides as a Museum ship.
Uses the RU Delny gunboat build
Slot 3 MAM2 is taken because otherwise the guns are unusuable while dodging
You may
Extra gun range is usually not needed for typical Tier 6 combat ranges and relative lack of radar. If you do feel like you need it, trade PM and BFT
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Fast torpedo boat with fast reloading torps but poor concealment
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.

Powerful Commonwealth DD boasting excellent concealment, gun firepower, hydro, and a crawling smoke at the cost of less torpedo power. Removed from direct sale due to her overwhelming power and can only be obtained by getting lucky in Santa crates or supercontainers
You can visit the irl HMCS Haida in Hamilton,Ontario where she currently resides as a museum ship.
Uses the typical gunboat DD build
Can trade FB for RPF for improved anti-DD capabilities
Engine boost mod > Hydro mod as hydro duration is sufficient
Close range gunboat playstyle, leans in to her 5.7km concealment to get close and ambush other DDs. Crawling smoke and hydro helps you avoid blind fire and torps while you farm in return.
Crawling smoke will conceal you if you move at ¼ speed. Going faster than 12.5kt means you will outspeed your smoke
Even though it's not optimal, you can share this build with Vampire II.
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Tier 7 Commonwealth DD. An open water gunboat that trades smoke for heal and hydro. Heavily relies on guns due to her poor torpedo firepower
Essentially an open water gunboat of Haida with better shell ballistics and no smoke
Uses the gunboat DD build
You can trade CE for +20% gun range for easier farming (especially when fighting secondary BBs), but at the cost of fighting stealthy DDs
Engine Boost mod is preferred as the extra evasion helps you conserve HP during fights
Hydro mod is fine, but less ideal
Solid gunboat with good concealment for bumping other DDs
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Tier 7 Pan EU DD. Mid-long range gunboat with great guns, decent torps, and terrible concealment
Uses the gunboat DD build
Can trade FB for +20% gun range or SI if you aren’t fighting in open water very often
For full damage build, trade CE for +20% gun range skill
Blyskawica plays similarly to the Russian DDs like Minsk, can either farm at long range or get close with smoke
Keep in mind Blyskawica plays very different to her ‘44 and ‘52 versions
Tier 8 US DD that trades a torp rack for a heal. Very tanky compared to other DDs, though her poor torpedo firepower is a problem when fighting larger ships
USS Kidd currently resides in Baton Rouge, Louisiana as a museum ship
Uses the gunboat DD build, but slightly modified to give more utility
Can trade 2pt Consumable Enhancement for DE if you want more literal firepower, note that your fires/min isn’t great even if you take all the fire chance improvements
RPF is fine if you want to build towards anti-DD. In this case, trade 3pt gun reload and Consumable Enhancement
FB is ok, but less recommended as you want to use smoke or take short fights to offset your slow shells.
If you don’t have Engine boost mod, use ERP

Kidd uses a close range gunboat playstyle, gunning down DDs and patching up any damage with heal. Smoke can be used to farm larger ships, or used on your allies so they can farm damage while you get combat scout medals.
This ship has radar which means enemy DDs can’t really spot her for free even with a no CE build, which makes a build like this viable in randoms.
Tier 8 Pan Asian DD that shreds lightly armored targets with her improved AP shells and torps larger ships with deepwater torps. Slow top speed and anemic HE hurts her flexibility.
Irl she was the Akizuki-class Yoizuki that was given to the Republic of China Navy as part of war reparations
Her AP has 60°-68° pen angles, same as US CAs
Uses a slightly modified gunboat DD build, taking Extra Heavy AP to take full advantage of her excellent AP shells
If you feel like you need more range, swap BFT and HAP for AFT.
IFHE is mandatory as her HE shells can’t even penetrate DD plating by default.
If you don’t have Engine boost mod, use ERP

Fenyang’s playstyle is a close - mid range AP gunboat. Very effective against DDs and cruisers, and can even farm down BBs if you target the correct areas. Go for the weaker armored sections like bow/stern/superstructure with AP. Only use HE if the target goes bow in and there is nothing better to do
Tier 9 US DD. Essentially a Fletcher class DD with 7.5km radar and extremely slow torps. Radar and solid close range DPM makes her very effective against other stealthy DDs.
Fletcher DD that trades a torp rack and some gun DPM for tactical rocket planes
Halford can store 2 charges of attack planes
RPF is viable for dedicated anti-DD builds as you can send the planes in the direction of your RPF
Trade Aircraft mod in Slot 4 for Prop mod if you find the acceleration too slow
US Fletcher with SAP shells and burst fire in exchange for long torpedo reloads
Johnston has more DPM when using burst fire
Johnson uses a close range gunboat build
Trade FB for RPF if you prefer better anti-DD capabilties
Applies to GQ Johnny as well
Fletcher class DD with faster reloading guns and torps, but lower alpha damage per salvo.
Irl she was the Flecther class DD USS Charrette who was transferred to Greece in 1959. She was renamed to Velos and served in the Hellenic Navy until 1991.
She currently resides in Thessaloniki, Greece as a museum ship.
Uses the standard US Gearing DD build
For full support build, trade Fill the Tubes for Superintendent and give your cruiser buddies an extra smoke
Similar playstyle to Fletcher, but more oriented towards gunboat. Kind of like Kidd.
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Stealthy torpedo spamming DD, but with poor torp damage and low gun DPM. Also, CVs can sit on your head all day since you have effectively no AA
Uses the standard torpedo DD build
Trade RPF for SI if you are good at predicting enemy DD movement
Swirski is really good once the torp ribbons start rolling in
If you don’t have the Engine boost mod, use ERP.
Smoke gunboatwith amazing gun DPM, US enhanced smoke, and 5km hydro at the cost of speed and lack of torpedoes.
Recommended coal ship if you like DD gunboats
Uses a gunboat build
If you need an extra smoke, trade BFT for SI
Running Janssen or De Ruyter does not change this build as DE does not give a significant fire chance boost
Building into DPM is preferred because Neustrashimy has incredible survivability that will allow her to win DD duels, so you might as well improve upon that ability.
12.8km main gun range is sufficient, so extra gun range is not necessary
You can also swap DE and BFT for Fearless and a 1 pt skill of your choice if you want a bigger advantage in DD duels.
ZF-6 is a “German” DD that trades hydro and torp range for amazing AP and MBRB
This build capitalizes on her strong AP and MBRB to burst down vulnerable DDs
The improved ricochet angles and short fuze lets you shred lightly armored targets extremely quickly with MBRB
For better late game power, trade BFT for SI.
Z-44 is a torp focused DD unlike the other German DDs, respectable and spammable 12km torps but poor main gun firepower and no hydro
Standard torp DD build
You can trade RPF for main gun reload if you are confident in predicting enemy positions
Italian gunboat DD that shoots an unholy amount of SAP shells
Barb can switch between faster firing 26mm pen SAP and slower firing 34mm SAP
A comfort build with range, you can freely farm after trying to be impactful at the start of the game helping with DD fights

Alternative farming build focused on consumable duration to maximize exhaust smoke uptime with no AFT on following page for players more experienced with positioning in farming DDs (Sansonetti recommended for extra consumable duration after talent proc)
Blyskawica ‘44 is an AP-only open water gunboat DD with improved AP pen angles, heal, hydro and enhanced speed boost. Lack of smoke and HE makes her difficult to play
Blysk uses a gunboat DD build, but with Extra Heavy AP since you only have AP
For full damage farming, trade CE for FB. Extra gun range is not beneficial due to low AP pen and inability to start fires
Keep in mind Blysk 44 plays very differently from her base version and ‘52 version
If you don’t have Speed boost mod, use ERP

Blyskawica ‘52 specializes in denying caps and fighting universal DDs due to her fast reloading 9km radar, similar to Gdansk. Respectable at long range damage farming thanks to her 30mm HE pen. No smoke and somewhat floaty ballistics makes her very micro intensive to play compared to other DDs
This versatile build allows her to do both DD hunting and damage farming depending on the situation
Trade AFT for RPF if you want extra info on DD movements to make your radar uses more efficient
For full damage farming, trade CE for FB. This will degrade your anti-DD capabilities due to increased engagement range and resulting loss of firepower
Radar mod is recommended for anti-DD playstyle. Speed boost is better if you want to focus on damage farming. If you don’t have either, use ERP.

Nanning is a universal DD with solid long range guns, sea mines for torps, and Pan Asia smoke for farming. Jack of all trades DD with no major strengths or weakness other than a high detection range for a universal DD.
This build focuses on improving her powerful guns while having the concealment to perform typical DD roles
You can  drop DE and PT for BFT and GTG
Dropping PT for Extra Heavy ammo is interesting as well as ship has high AP pen for the tier. You can get constant 4k salvoes on broadside BBs and cruisers, and even citadel cruisers under 8km
Mid-long range gunboat with Des Moines guns. Amazing AP, strong dodging abilities, and a heal in exchange for no smoke
Think French DD playstyle but with better AP but slower top speed
Trade FB for CE if you want to get closer for DD support or more reliable citadels
Last 1pt skill can be Gun Feeder for instant switch to AP or Consumable Specialist for faster cooldown on heal and speed boost
If you don’t have Engine boost mod, you can use ERP. But really, if you can afford Hull, you can afford to spend 17k coal on a upgrade
Close range gunboat with superheal, toggle smoke, and burst fire. Very high survivability with smoke and heal, but at the cost of slow speed and relatively low damage output
Somewhat similar playstyle to Daring
Smoke is better suited for quick disengages due to the short duration
Burst fire cooldown is 25s base, only use it when disengaging or finishing off enemies
Trade RPF for FB if you are confindent in your ability to track DDs
If you aren’t getting value out of the 3rd heal, trade SI for BFT
Atlanta is the OG HE spamming ship, very squishy with floaty shells, but amazing firepower and radar that strikes fear into every DD player
Flint trades Atlanta’s radar and some DPM for US smoke and 9.2km range torps
IFHE is recommended for ranked, drop SE and Consumable specialist in that case.

Tier 7 Nurnberg with improved ballistics (Elbing guns), German hydro, and RN short smokes. More comfortable to play with easier to hit shells, enhanced AP, and short smoke for defense, but still explodes whenever a BB looks at her.
Also gets 9.5km torps if enemies are rushing at close range
Standard German Hindenberg cruiser build, but switches TGG for Outnumbered.
Lutjens synergizes well with Nurnberg, though he should be prioritized for other higher tier ships
Also applies to her clone ship Optio
Pan American clone of Boise, close-mid range CL with a powerful broadside salvo and superheal, but lower main gun range
If you don’t have hydro mod, take ERP instead
Pan Asia cruiser with Soviet design origins. Mounts Russian 180mm guns on Budyonny’s hull, leading to a fast, if somewhat fragile long range damage farming cruiser.
Gets enhanced AP pen angles (50-65° instead of the normal 45-60°)
Also gets short(er) fuse AP, great for citadelling broadside cruisers with lower risk of overpens, like vs. Atlanta
Uses the RU Nevsky build, but trades SI for other skills
If you don’t have hydro mod, take ERP instead
US CL with SAP shells, improved DD shell ballistics, heal, and a (weaker) MBRB
Atlanta class hull is both a pro and a con

If you can't spare a dedicated captain, you can share this captain with Austin. You shouldn’t, however, share the Austin captain with San Diego because it includes DE, which is worthless on SD as she doesn’t have HE.
The build order here prioritises firepower over survivability. However, you can prioritise SE over HSAP if you prefer survivability first
Last skill point is luxury, spend it on whatever 1pt skill that resonates with you

Considering these ships have poor HE DPM and a massive detection to range buffer, HHE is a very good skill. If you’re not comfortable with the increased detection range from this skill, drop it and DE for TGG or any other combination of skills of your choice. Note that you won’t benefit from HAP as the guns’ calibre is too small.
If you don’t feel like DE is useful, drop it for QoL skills like IFA and EM.
If you're dedicating this build to Kirov or Molotov only, you may want to swap SI for any skill combination of your preference.

If you’re feeling extra cocky you can swap SE for Heavy HE, but it’s not recommended unless you have a divmate smoke you up regularly because Mainz is not really tanky enough to have such a large detection radius.
Also applies to Königsberg, Nürnberg, Makarov, München and Leipzig. If you want to share this captain with München, pick LS instead of EL.
If you don’t have the Hydro mod, use ERP.
Tier 8 Pan Asian cruiser derivative of the Tiger 59. Keeps the rapid fire super-accurate guns, but trades radar for speed boost, hydro, and HE shells.
Close range damage farming playstyle. Compared to other CLs, Narai emphasizes judicious use of her consumables to stay alive while rewarding good aim with her extremely accurate shells.
Uses the standard CL build. Not recommended to share captains with the Jinan if the latter is running torpedo skills and/or Heavy HE.

Tier 8 Tone and Tier 9 Chikuma II are hybrid cruisers with great concealment and can deliver torps via shipbourne torps or their tactical torpedo floatplanes. Extra heal offsets their poor citadel protection, but their low DPM leaves their guns a lot to be desired.
Chikuma also has smoke consumables
This build is tailored around the 2 ships, increasing their firepower to complement their amazing utility
Tone and Chikuma have 4 repairs by default, which makes speccing into SI for a 5th one pretty redundant. SE is superior for survivability
If you dislike the idea of HHE and want to maximise your concealment, pick FTT and Swift Fish instead.
Suzuki is a good pick for her improved SE. Though if you don’t these ship often, it maybe better to build Suzuki for your other Japanese cruisers
If you don’t have the Hydro mod, use ERP.
Kozma Minin is a Tier 9 Donskoi Dmitri analog that trades her 180mm guns and slight radar duration for German 203mm guns and a speed boost.
The 203mm guns offer 51mm HE pen and faster reload at the cost of alpha damage
Same build as the Russian Nevsky line, focusing on improving her radar and speed boost
Similar playstyle to Donskoi, with Donskoi performing better vs. DDs and Kozma performing better vs. BBs
If you don’t have radar mod, take ERP instead
This is a “reasonable” lighthouse build. You can swap CE for TGG if you want to go even more extreme.

Tier 9 French large cruiser that uses her main guns to charge her combat instructions before unleashing her powerful secondaries. Powerful in close range when she can unleash her secondaries, but has underwhelming firepower other wise
BA Utnapishtim’s Ship is the weeb version and has identical performance
Utnapishtim’s Ship is based off the flying space battleship from the mobile game Blue Archive, playing a central role during the assault on the Ark of Atrahasis.
Note: Utnapishtim’s Ship WoWs version might be somewhat nerfed compared to her BA counterpart.  🙁
La Havre uses a secondary build to take advantage of her combat instruction gimmick. You can use the Marseille build, but Brest is a far better choice
To fully charge combat instructions, you need 10 main battery hits
Note that La Havre’s secondaries are mostly in the rear
Spotter is highly recommended due to its accuracy increasing gimmick
If you don’t have the Spotter mod, use MAM1.
US Heavy cruiser that comes with heal and MBRB instead of smoke or hydro. Judicious use of MBRB is critical to offset her poor base reload
Can use the same build as the Des Moines line, but take hydro instead of radar mod
US Heavy cruiser hull with Alaska 305mm guns, powerful AP and has superheal
Uses the typical US CA build
Heavy AP is a decent alternative to SE if you are willing to give up some survivability
Mid range damage farmer who heavily punishes broadside ships
You can trade TGG for Heavy AP if you feel like you aren’t getting enough benefits
US Large cruiser with rapid fire DD guns. Has an alternative fire mode that further increases her already insane DPM at the cost of floatier shells
Uses Alaska hull with Sherman guns, (Gearing shells during alt fire)

Close range powerhouse with extremely high DPM and a sturdy and hard to citadel hull. 8.5km radar also lets her catch out and obliterate close range DDs. High surface detection can make it difficult to close to effective range
Similar build to Atlanta, Flint, San Diego, and Austin. However, Hawaii’s high HP pool allows her to forgo SE in favor of TGG.
Trade Consumable Enhancement for DE if more fires is desired
If you don’t have hydro mod, use DCM1 instead
Alternative fire uses Gearing shells, trading ballistics for drastically higher DPM
Recommend using under ~8-10km, or further if you are confident in your aim
German Light Cruiser with very high DPM, improved HE pen, and a sturdy CA hull.
Uses Clausewitz hull with Mainz guns
12km torps, unusually long for a German cruiser

Insane DPM machine that can quickly shred targets with HE, or AP if they stay broadside. Floaty shells and a high surface detection holds her firepower back in some situations. Also be careful of her poor rear firing angles and brick handling
Standard cruiser build. Keep in mind Bremen does not get the +1 heal found in the Hindenburg line
Trade Priority Target for DE if more fires is desired.
Last point is player choice, trade IFA for Gun Feeder if you want
Don’t underestimate the AP, you can literally double your damage output on broadside targets at close range
Partial Lighthouse build for Bremen
Has even more firepower than standard build, but is much harder to play due to the lack of disengage options. Floaty shells also demands better aim if you choose to play at long range
We recommend a partial Lighthouse build due to Bremen’s relatively floaty shells.
This build has 16.7km detection. It’s good enough at the start if you are using an island to turn out into a kiting position, or farming behind the island
Without CE, Bremen will have 18.6 surface detection. Given Bremen’s floaty shells and average maneuverability, it will be hard to position to make full use of her firepower
Alternative: You can swap Heavy HE for SE, it sacrifices firepower for better survivability. But it does bring your surface detect down to a more comfortable 14.5km.
Take those suggestions into consideration based on your playstyle and experience with lighthouse builds.
Both Mikasa and Agincourt are low tier secondary focused BBs
No concealment necessary due to the close quarters nature of low tiers, and bots
IFHE allows Mikasa secondaries to pen 16mm armor common to Tier 3 BBs
IFHE also lets Agincourt’s 152mm secondaries to pen 31mm, sufficient for T7 BBs
Agincourt 152mm deals the vast majority of her damage, so the 102mm nerf doesn’t matter
Use the secondary signal for slightly more secondary range
Dreadnaught with a massive 14 gun broadside, but slow reload and top speed. Kind of like US mid tier BBs
Standard tank BB build
BoS is taken as low tier BBs rarely get to 2 mill potential damage to justify IRPR
Renown’s sister ship. Trades gun reload and torps for better accuracy and longer speed boost
Can share the same build as the RN BC/St.Vincent line
If you are sharing captains, refer to the St.Vincent build
BoS > IRPR in low-mid tiers as ships rarely get to 2 million potential to trigger the +1 heal
Hybrid BB with torpedo bombers. Has similar gun firepower to Tier 5 Kongo
Ise’s torpedo bombers are great for spotting and forcing ships to turn broadside to your team
Do not worry about losing planes, you will regen a new squad about 2 minutes after launch
Brawler version of Tier 7 Lyon. Gets improved secondaries at the cost of significantly weaker shells for her main guns
Secondary build gets the most out of Lugdunum’s secondaries while retaining respectable protection
For ranked, trade GtG for IFHE as 27mm pen will dramatically increase your damage output vs other T7 and below ships. You can also trade CE for Manual secondaries
You can also run a standard tank build, though this is better suited for Lyon
Russian battlecruiser with improved main battery accuracy at the cost of armor and speed
Irl she is Royal Sovereign that was transferred to the USSR during WW2.
Uses the standard mid tier tank BB build
BoS is preferred as mid tier BBs are unlikely to get 2 million potential to trigger the +1 heal from IRPR
If you are sharing BB captains, take IRPR as it is much more beneficial for higher tier BBs.
Typical BB playstyle, though keep in mind her relative fragility compared to other BBs
Her battlecruiser accuracy rewards good aim
If you don’t have the Spotter mod, use MAM1.
Given Odin’s exceptionally good concealment, CE is preferred to ERE, unlike on tech tree German BBs. You can, however, share this build with the tech tree BBs.

Given that she has a larger number of 105s compared to her peers and relies a bit more on sneaking around to get into close range due to her lower HP pool, she benefits more from this build than the standard German BB one. You can, however, share a standard German BB captain with her.
Tier 8 Italian BB with well balanced stats and no standout gimmicks. Good concealment and very fast shells offset her short base range and inconsistent accuracy.
Her AP shells are trolly, citadeling heavily armored BBs in 1 salvo and overpenning/missing broadside cruisers in the next.
AL Littorio and Roma Aeterna are statistically identical to Roma
Standard BB tank build
You can use the same build you use for the Italian BB tech tree line
Spotter plane mod in Slot 1 is fine if you feel you constantly need the extra range
Roma’s playstyle is more like standard mid range BBs like North Carolina
If you’re wondering why PM is recommended, it’s because Roma’s turrets tend to break often.

Champagne is a high speed Tier 8 Battlecruiser with exceptional long range accuracy and very fast shells. Main Battery Reload Booster allows for quick follow up shots, but her weak armor makes her vulnerable at closer range
This build focuses on Champagne’s speed and concealment to abuse quickly relocating around the map. This pushes her top speed to 42.4kts. Yes, you can outrun a lot of DDs
Prop mod or Rudder Mod in Slot 4 is fine. You can speedjuke salvoes with speed boost and some practice
Tier 8 version of Lyon, uses weaker guns but fires faster shells and gains MBRB. Low caliber guns and awkward gun angles can make gunnery a pain at times
Typical French/Tank BB build, increasing survivability so you can last longer to fire more salvoes
Keep in mind your 305mm guns will only overmatch CL armor. CA armor will bounce your AP when angled
Atlântico requires Brisk due to her low top speed. You can also replace DCSM2 with the propulsion mod for the same reason.

Giuseppe Verdi, Marcantonio Colonna, and BA Binah are SAP secondary focused BBs. Strong at close range when their SAP can rip apart enemies in the safety of exhaust smoke, though at the cost of mid-long performance.
Giuseppe Verdi is Tier 9
BA Binah is the weeb version of Colonna with identical performance
Binah is based off the raid boss of the same name in the mobile game Blue Archive
Secondary build is recommended to get the most out of what the ship is intended for
You can switch PM for Gun Feeder depending on personal preference
Standard BB tank build is viable, but you are better off playing Roma instead
Smoke is useful for turning broadside in front of enemies while your SAP secondaries farms them. Be wary of radar, hydro, or even accurate blindfire ruining your fun
Don’t shoot you main guns in smoke unless you are ok with being spotted
You may use the standard IJN BB captain build in case you can’t afford a dedicated captain for this ship.
Ludicriously fast BB with big guns, amazing accuracy, and even good durability thanks to her fast heals. Great all around BB that is only obtainable in Santa crates due to how powerful she is.
Uses a standard tank BB build, but takes the 3pt secondary skill and Secondary range mod to take advantage of her improved secondary dispersion
Standard US Montana BB build is fine. In this case, use MBM2 instead of secondary range in slot 3. Remember, US BBs don’t get accuracy mod in slot 3
IFHE is not recommended as 26mm pen is not worth the loss in fire chance

While she has great secondaries, Georgia is best played at mid range due to her powerful 457mm guns and high speed. Brawling is best saved for the mid/late game or against T7/8 opponents you can brute force through
If you don’t have Engine Boost Mod, just buy it. Don’t cheap out on your new luxury ship.
A few things that have to be noted to avoid confusion:

The range mod is there mostly for the improvement in vertical dispersion (look up how vertical dispersion correlates with firing range on the WoWs wiki). However, if you are confident in your aim, you may attempt to use these guns past your stock maximum firing range.
If you don’t feel like the additional range benefits you at all, you may replace the range mod with the turret traverse mod.
Due to Illinois’ high speed and cruiser guns, the combination of Brisk and Propulsion mod is preferred. Also, her guns tend to break often, so PM is a high value skill.
In case you don’t find your guns break often, and in case you find the fire resistance of this build lacking, you may replace EM and PM with BoS, or Propulsion with DCSM2.
Reload mod is preferred over dispersion mod due to the decent stock accuracy.

Tier 9 Russian BB, essentially an uptiered Vladivostok with better guns, armor, conealment, and DFAA (for what it’s worth). Shares all the same problems with the original Vlad including poor long range accuracy.
BA Hovercraft is the weeb version with identical performance.
Based off of Wakamo’s hovercraft she deploys during her Phase 2 boss fight in the mobile game Blue Archive
Uses the standard RU BB build
Plays similarly to other Tech Tree Russian BBs, get up close and blast away with your accurate guns. Face tank the enemy and occupy their attention while your teammates (hopefully) support your push.
Despite being a “torpedo battleship”, the majority of her damage comes from her main guns and, as such, should be built for them.

Due to her incredible concealment, you could also make a secondary build similar to the one on German BBs (swapping BoS for secondary range and ERE for MS). However, note that you will, on average, have worse performance compared to a main battery build.
Victoria is essentially a Roma that gets burst fire and MBRB
This is a balanced build that buffs Victoria’s awesome firepower in order to maximise her game impact.
You can trade Heavy AP for IRPR if you want better survivability
If you don’t have the Spotter mod, use MAM1.
Pan Asian Sniper BB with extremely fast shells and high AP pen. Excels at long range fights (15km+) but poor durability and slow reload lets her down if enemies manage to get close
Standard tank build is recommended if you are not very experienced with playing low survivability sniping focused battleships
A more glass cannon damage focused build can be found on the following page
Specialized build with more firepower at the cost of survivability
Trade ERE for Furious if you want to maximize firepower at the cost of even more survivability
Extremely durable BB that uses combat instruction-boosted heals to survive even the heaviest focus fire. Her effectiveness dramatically falls off if she can’t close the distance
Combat instructions require 13 secondary hits or 1 kill to fill completely
Note: This build is specifically designed for randoms as the concealment is invaluable for getting close so you can do Valparasio things.
For ranked, trade CE for IRPR for better staying power
Manual secondaries is preferred due to the poor main gun firing angles
Close Quarter Combat is a fine alternative if you can manage your rudder effectively
Vigilance is a decent alternative to Brisk as torps severely reduce the amount you can heal
Valparasio’s win con is to get within 12km so she can farm her combat instructions to keep her heals going. Smart enemies will use this against you and kite when possible

French Sniper BB with fast shells and battlecruiser accuracy, all mounted on a 38kt hull when speed boost is active. Even gets Main Battery Reload Booster because she is French. However, her slow base reload speed and squishy hull hurts her in close range fights.
Rousillion gets 1 less heal than standard BBs
Rousillion uses the same build as the tech tree French BB line. Use her mobility to reposition for better shots and to stay out of danger
Consumable Specialist is highly recommended to reduce the cooldown on her MBRB
If you can’t afford Engine mod in slot 2, use DCM1
Alternative build that deals more damage at the expense of compromising your already frail defenses
Heavy AP provides a significant damage boost if you can manage her increased vulnerability to fires
While you could give up FP for Furious, this is not recommended as the situational reload benefits is not enough to justify the loss in survivability
Recommended once you are comfortable with Roussillion’s handling and want to min max her performance
Dutch BB with powerful long range airstrikes and powerful AP, but her Duncan hull makes her citadel very easy to hit when broadside
Standard BB tank build, but take both  the 3pt Focus Fire Training Slot 4 Airstrike Mod and for faster reloading airstrikes
Willem’s citadel sits extremely high above the waterline. Protect your broadside at all costs!
Willem’s airstrikes takes ~17s to land, use on stationary and/or island hugging ships.
Warning: Willem’s airstrikes and Depth Charge airstrikes share the same cooldown!!!
If you don’t have Engine Boost Mod in slot 2, use DCM 1
Highly recommend using Helfrich if available

BB with a smoke cruiser playstyle due to her 16x 234mm CA guns and crawling smoke. Great at farming damage and has respectable survivability outside of smoke, but lacks the ability for long range crossfire commonly seen on typical BBs
Uses the Marlborough hull, Goliath guns, and commonwealth smoke generator
Irresistable uses the typical survivability build with minor adjustments
DE is tempting, but doesn’t increase the fire chance by a significant amount in practice
Beware her 10.2km smoke firing penalty, it’s an awkward moment when you are slow and broadside in smoke and suddenly get revealed in front of the entire enemy team
Sibir is basically a secondary focused Kremlin with weaker armor, a unique heal, and combat instructions
Combat instructions require 34 secondary hits, 2 million potential damage, or a combination of both. In practice, you are getting CI through secondary hits
Sibir’s heal operates on a pool system. You can use all of Sibir’s heal in one go, or you can start/stop on demand depending on the situation.
This build aims to reduce fire damage as much as possible due to limited heals
If you are confident with HP management, you can trade DCM2 for Steering/Prop
Remember to use secondary signal to boost your secondary range
Take MBM3 in slot 6 so you can shoot 2 salvoes when using CI
Aki is a hybrid BB with Yamato guns in front, and a flight deck for tactical HE DBs in the rear.
Long range focused BB with extremely hard hitting dive bombers, but struggles against enemies who manage to get close and/or outflank her
Standard BB build with slight changes to buff her tactical bombers
All-forward armament means you can sit bow in without sacrificing firepower
Each DB attack is roughly equivalent to 2 Midway HE DB strikes, ouch
Aki can store up to 2 charges of her bombers
If you don’t have the DCP mod, use MAM1. If no Battery mod, use DCSM3.
Fast submarine with deepwater torpedoes and a reserve battery for extended underwater operations
Irl she is S-25 that was transferred from the USSR to the PRC in 1955
Name literally translates to “New China No.14”
Standard submarine build
Emphasis on improving her consumables to make full use of the skill “Enlarged Propeller Shaft” (EPS)

Ideally at the start of the match, you drain the battery to below half to activate the +18% speed boost. From here, you can run around the enemy spamming torps and even surfacing to troll with your 1 gun.
Use the reserve battery when under half battery so you keep EPS active
If you don’t find SI useful feel free to swap it for any combination of 1 and 2 point skills you may find useful (except LS because subs don’t lose steering and engine)
